text: I'll get to that joke in a minute. Actually, maybe tomorrow. You know what, let me think about it first. I need the right setup. Let me just check something real quick. Okay I'm back. Where was I? Right, the joke. I'll write it down so I don't forget. It's going to be really good once I start it. Anyway — why do procrastinators make great philosophers? They always think deeply about what they're going to do next.
